metadata.description: The Context Architecture skill: audit and rework an existing codebase so it is legible to people and AI agents.

plugins.name: context-architecture
plugins.description: Audit and rework an existing codebase so it is legible to people and AI agents. Applies the eight principles of Context Architecture: place AGENTS.md at boundaries, codify conventions in lint and types, find context-rot, and back every claim the repo makes about itself with a check that fails when it stops being true. A retrofit procedure for codebases that already exist, not a scaffolder for new ones.
